meta.title: AI Educademy, Free AI Education for Everyone
meta.description: Learn Artificial Intelligence from scratch, in your language. No coding experience needed.

nav.latestArticles: Latest articles on AI, education, and technology
nav.missionDesc: Making AI education accessible to everyone, everywhere
nav.valuesDesc: Open source, multilingual, and forever free

hero.title: Learn AI.
hero.subtitle: Free interactive lessons that take you from curious beginner to confident builder. Start from zero — go as far as you want.

features.title: Why AI Educademy?
features.subtitle: Start from zero. No prerequisites needed — we guide you every step.

beginner.title: Start from Zero
beginner.description: Never touched code? Good. We use everyday language and real-world examples, how Netflix recommends films, how your phone recognises your face.

interactive.title: Learn by Doing
interactive.description: Hands-on experiments in your browser. Train an AI to recognise drawings, teach a chatbot, see results instantly.

multilingual.title: In Your Language
multilingual.description: Learn in Hindi, Telugu, French, Dutch, or English, whichever feels like home.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: No subscriptions, no paywalls. Open-source, community-built, free forever.

community.title: Learn Together
community.description: Ask questions, share experiments, help translate lessons.

practical.title: Real-World AI
practical.description: How AI powers search engines, voice assistants, social feeds, self-driving cars, and medical diagnosis.

features.structuredDesc: Carefully sequenced tracks from beginner to expert
features.lessonsDesc: Deep, well-researched content across every topic
features.languagesDesc: Learn in English, French, Dutch, Hindi, or Telugu
features.labDesc: Hands-on experiments to solidify your understanding
features.openSourceDesc: Fully transparent — view, fork, or contribute
features.freeDesc: No paywalls, no premium tiers, free forever

founder.description: Decade and a half across fintech, media, and retail — building large-scale systems at multinational giants like JP Morgan, Sky, and a major UK retailer. Worked across Asia and Europe, currently based in London, helping digitise a global retail tech estate. Working in countries where English isn't the first language made one thing clear — language should never be a barrier to learning. Speaks English, French, and Telugu.
founder.role: Engineering Leader · Open Source Builder · London

about.title: About AI Educademy
about.missionText: AI education for every student, regardless of language, background, or experience.
about.storyText1: I'm Ramesh Reddy Adutla, an engineering leader with 15 years across fintech, media, and retail, building large-scale systems at global giants like JP Morgan, Sky, and Marks & Spencer across Asia and Europe. Currently based in London, helping one of the UK's biggest retailers digitalise their technology estate.
about.storyText2: AI will reshape every industry. Yet the best AI education remains locked behind expensive institutions in a handful of countries. That gap isn't just unfair, it's a massive waste of potential.
about.storyText3: A conversation about millions of students being left behind sparked this. AI Educademy started as a side project, it grew into something real.
about.storyText4: Working across multiple countries where English isn't the first language made one thing clear: language should never be a barrier to learning. I speak English, French, and Telugu, so building a multilingual platform felt like the obvious move.

value1.title: Accessible
value1.description: If you can open a web browser, you can learn AI. No special software, no powerful computer needed.

value2.title: Inclusive
value2.description: Education in your language, with examples from your culture. AI isn't just a Silicon Valley thing.

value3.title: Honest
value3.description: We teach what AI can do AND what it can't. No hype, no fear, just understanding.

value4.title: Open
value4.description: Every lesson, every line of code is open source. Fork it, translate it, improve it.

about.subtitle: Founder · Engineering Leader · Open Source Advocate
about.timeline2011: Started career in software engineering in India 🇮🇳
about.timeline2014: Moved to Belgium, built fintech systems, learned French 🇧🇪
about.timeline2017: JP Morgan, trading platforms and high-performance systems ��
about.timeline2019: Sky, streaming platform serving millions of users 📺
about.timeline2021: Cloud-native microservices and data pipelines at scale 🛒
about.timeline2024: Open-source contributions, Apache Gravitino, GOV.UK, Spring Boot MCP 🌐
about.timeline2025: Founded AI Educademy, free AI education for everyone 🎓
about.pageDescription: AI Educademy is a free, open-source AI education platform built for everyone. Learn about our mission to make AI education accessible worldwide.
about.pageSubtitle: Free, open-source AI education for every student.
about.openSourceDesc: Every lesson, every line of code — free and open source. Fork it, translate it, make it yours.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Every lesson builds on the last. No rush, no assumptions.
lessons.trackCompleteDesc: You have finished every lesson in
lessons.quizIncorrect: Not quite — but that is how we learn!

programs.title: Choose Your Learning Path
programs.subtitle: Pick the level that matches where you are.
programs.pageDescription: Explore our free AI learning tracks and software engineering academics. From absolute beginner to advanced, learn at your own pace in 5 languages.

ai-learning.title: Understanding AI
ai-learning.desc: Grow from zero to AI expert, nature-inspired progression
ai-learning.brand: Understand how machines think, learn, and create — from your first "what is AI?" to building production systems.

craft-engineering.title: Code & Algorithms
craft-engineering.desc: Ace your dream interview, workshop-inspired mastery
craft-engineering.brand: Learn the algorithms that power AI, design the systems that scale AI, and ace the interviews that land you AI-era jobs.

ai-seeds.title: AI Seeds
ai-seeds.subtitle: Plant Your First AI Knowledge
ai-seeds.description: Start from absolute zero. We use plain language and everyday examples to build your understanding, step by step.
ai-seeds.audience: Complete beginners with no technical background
outcomes: Understand what AI is and isn't
Know how machines learn from data
Train a simple AI model in your browser

ai-sprouts.title: AI Sprouts
ai-sprouts.subtitle: Build Your AI Foundations
ai-sprouts.description: Ready to grow? Dive into the building blocks of AI — data, algorithms, and neural networks. Hands-on exercises help you build intuition before writing code.
ai-sprouts.audience: Learners who completed AI Seeds or have basic AI awareness
outcomes: Distinguish supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Understand what training data is and why it matters
Think critically about AI bias and fairness

ai-branches.title: AI Branches
ai-branches.subtitle: Explore Real-World Applications
ai-branches.description: See AI in action across industries — healthcare, finance, creative arts, and more. Start building simple projects and understand the tools professionals use.
ai-branches.audience: Learners ready to see AI applied in practice
outcomes: Build a simple chatbot
Understand how image recognition works
Create an AI-powered mini project

ai-canopy.title: AI Canopy
ai-canopy.subtitle: Deep Dive into AI Systems
ai-canopy.description: Go deeper into neural networks, large language models, and AI system design. Learn to evaluate AI tools critically and understand the engineering behind modern AI.
ai-canopy.audience: Intermediate learners ready for technical depth
outcomes: Understand how neural networks work
Master prompt engineering techniques
Evaluate AI tools and services critically

ai-forest.title: AI Forest
ai-forest.subtitle: Master the AI Ecosystem
ai-forest.description: The complete picture — AI research, building production AI systems, contributing to open-source AI, and understanding where the field is heading. For those who want to shape the future.
ai-forest.audience: Advanced learners and aspiring AI practitioners
outcomes: Build and deploy an AI-powered application
Read and understand AI research papers
Contribute to open-source AI projects

ai-sketch.title: AI Sketch
ai-sketch.subtitle: Rough Outlines — DSA Fundamentals
ai-sketch.description: Master the fundamental data structures and algorithms that power AI systems. Arrays, hash maps, strings, and sorting — visualised with diagrams, explained with AI real-world applications.
ai-sketch.audience: Engineers starting interview prep or refreshing fundamentals
outcomes: Solve array and hash map problems confidently
Understand how these patterns power AI systems
Recognise common interview patterns

ai-chisel.title: AI Chisel
ai-chisel.subtitle: Carving Precision — Intermediate Patterns
ai-chisel.description: Level up with intermediate algorithmic patterns: two pointers, sliding window, BFS/DFS, and tree traversals. Each pattern tied to real AI/ML applications.
ai-chisel.audience: Engineers with DSA basics ready for medium-level problems
outcomes: Apply two pointers and sliding window to optimise solutions
Traverse trees and graphs with BFS/DFS
Connect these patterns to AI search and inference

ai-craft.title: AI Craft
ai-craft.subtitle: Building Skill — System Design
ai-craft.description: Design large-scale systems that power AI: recommendation engines, search autocomplete, rate limiters. Learn to think in architectures, not just code.
ai-craft.audience: Mid-to-senior engineers preparing for system design rounds
outcomes: Structure system design answers clearly
Design scalable distributed systems
Understand AI-specific infrastructure patterns

ai-polish.title: AI Polish
ai-polish.subtitle: Refining Excellence — Behavioral Mastery
ai-polish.description: Master the behavioral interview with structured frameworks. STAR method, leadership principles, AI-era scenarios, and communication strategies.
ai-polish.audience: Engineers at any level preparing for behavioral rounds
ai-polish.prerequisites: Real project experience to draw from
outcomes: Structure compelling stories using STAR
Communicate technical decisions clearly
Navigate AI ethics and leadership questions

ai-masterpiece.title: AI Masterpiece
ai-masterpiece.subtitle: Portfolio-Ready — End-to-End Case Studies
ai-masterpiece.description: Capstone projects combining DSA, system design, and behavioral skills. Design real systems end-to-end and build your engineering portfolio.
ai-masterpiece.prerequisites: Completed AI Sketch through AI Polish
outcomes: Complete end-to-end system designs
Perform confidently in mock interviews
Build a standout engineering portfolio

lab.title: AI Lab
lab.subtitle: Experiment with real AI concepts right in your browser. No installation, no coding, just play and learn!
lab.pageDescription: Experiment with AI concepts. Analyse sentiment, visualise neural networks, explore sorting algorithms, and understand tokenisation.
lab.footer: All demos run entirely in your browser, no data is sent to any server.

sorting.label: Sorting Algorithms
sorting.desc: Watch algorithms sort in real time

tokenizer.label: Tokeniser
tokenizer.desc: See how AI reads your text

aiOrHuman.title: Can You Tell the Difference?
aiOrHuman.description: Read {count} text snippets and guess whether each was written by a human or generated by AI. It's harder than you think.

common.avgDistance: Average distance from actual token count
common.reviewedBias: You reviewed {count} bias scenarios. Understanding bias is the first step to building fairer AI.
common.notQuiteTimeline: Not quite, here's the correct timeline:

emojiDecoder.title: Emoji Decoder
emojiDecoder.instruction: What AI concept do these emojis represent?

binaryTranslator.title: Binary Translator
binaryTranslator.instruction: Decode the binary into a word
binaryTranslator.hint: Hint: Each 8-digit group = one letter (A=65, B=66...)

speedTyper.title: Speed Typer
speedTyper.instruction: Type the AI term as fast as you can!

memoryMatch.title: Memory Match
memoryMatch.instruction: Match each AI term with its definition

aiTimeline.title: AI Timeline
aiTimeline.instruction: Tap events in chronological order (earliest first)

biasDetective.title: Bias Detective
biasDetective.instruction: Read the scenario and spot the bias

tokenCounter.title: Token Counter
tokenCounter.instruction: How many tokens does an LLM see?

aiTrivia.title: AI Trivia Challenge
aiTrivia.instruction: Test your knowledge of AI history, concepts, and famous figures!
aiTrivia.noScores: No scores yet. Be the first!

neuralNetwork.title: Neural Network Sandbox
neuralNetwork.instruction: Place data points and train a neural network to classify them

promptDojo.title: Prompt Engineering Dojo
promptDojo.instruction: Craft the perfect prompt to match the target output

algoRace.title: Algorithm Race
algoRace.instruction: Bet on a sorting algorithm and watch them race!

sentimentSection.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentSection.description: Analyse the emotional tone of any text using keyword-based NLP, runs entirely in your browser.
sentimentSection.placeholder: Type or paste any text to analyse its sentiment...

neuralSection.title: Neural Network Visualiser
neuralSection.description: Watch data flow through a neural network. Adjust inputs and see activations propagate.
neuralSection.explanation: Adjust the input sliders and click Forward Pass to watch data propagate through the network. Blue connections are positive weights, red are negative. Thicker lines mean stronger connections.

sortingSection.title: Sorting Algorithm Visualiser
sortingSection.description: Compare Bubble Sort, Quick Sort, and Merge Sort side by side.

tokenizerSection.title: AI Tokeniser
tokenizerSection.description: See how LLMs break text into tokens, the fundamental units AI processes.
tokenizerSection.placeholder: Type text to see how AI breaks it into tokens...
tokenizerSection.explanation: AI doesn't read text like humans. It breaks text into tokens, subword pieces processed individually. Longer words get split into smaller chunks.

hub.title: AI Lab
hub.subtitle: Interactive AI games and tools — play, experiment, and learn by doing.

playground.addBothPoints: Add both blue and red points, then train
playground.noDesigns: No saved designs yet. Start a new canvas!
playground.gameNeuralDesc: Build & train a tiny neural network — place points, watch it learn
playground.gamePromptDesc: Craft the perfect prompt to match target outputs
playground.gameAlgoDesc: Bet on sorting algorithms and watch them race in real-time
playground.gameTriviaDesc: Test your AI knowledge with timed questions
playground.gameDesignDesc: Drag, connect, and design — practise architecture diagrams
playground.promptPlaceholder: Type your prompt here... (Ctrl+Enter to submit)
playground.feedbackExcellent: 🎯 Excellent prompt! Clear, specific, and well-structured.
playground.feedbackGood: 👍 Good attempt! Try being more specific about the format and constraints.
playground.feedbackGettingThere: 📝 Getting there — include more relevant keywords and be explicit about what you want.
playground.feedbackVague: 🔄 Too vague. Try specifying the task, format, and any constraints explicitly.
playground.vagueResponse: I'm not sure what you're looking for. Could you be more specific about what you need?
playground.placeBet: // Place your bet — which algorithm wins?
playground.mergeWins: Merge Sort wins with O(n log n) guaranteed performance!
playground.quickWins: Quick Sort is the fastest on average — O(n log n) with low overhead!
playground.bubbleWins: Bubble Sort won?! That's extremely rare with random data — usually O(n²)!
playground.helpText: Dbl-click rename · Del remove · ⌘Z undo · ⌘+/- zoom · ⌘0 reset · Middle-click pan
